```yaml
finding_dispositions:
  schema_version: 1
  passes_run: [1]
  entries:
    - finding_id: F6
      pass: 1
      disposition: escalate
      classification: load-bearing
      disposition_rationale: "The finding changes the required maintainer decision path."
      also_flagged_by: [4]
```
